title: XOR Queries of a Subarray
hints: XOR is its own inverse, so repeating a value cancels it out. How can you use this to simplify range queries?
Precompute a prefix array where each entry stores the XOR of all elements from the start up to that index.
The answer for a range is derived from two prefix values. What special value serves as the identity for XOR to handle the start of the array correctly?
